name: Pepe Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 cans mandarin orange sections, well drained
2 (16 oz) cans pineapple chunks, well drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sugar, flour, and salt.
2. Add the pineapple juice and egg yolks.
3. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly until thick. Allow to cool completely.
4. Boil the Acine de Pepe in salt water for 8 to 10 minutes. Drain, rinse, and cool completely.
5. Add the cooked Acine de Pepe to the pineapple sauce.
6. Add the mandarin orange sections, pineapple chunks, and marshmallows.
7. Add nuts and maraschino cherries (if using).
8. When ready to serve, add the Cool Whip.
